name: Cinnamon Peach Tart
recipeInstructions:
- Apricot Glaze:
- Combine 1 cup Jam, apricot; 1/2 cup Sugar; and 1/4 cup Water in a heavy saucepan.
- Mix well, bring to a boil, then simmer until clear.
- Peach Filling:
- Cut 10 ripe Peaches into eight sections.
- Arrange the peach sections snugly in the baked tart shell.
- Lightly brush apricot glaze over all peaches and serve.
